note: Intentional fixture bugs. Each is a different class so Inspector's oracles get full coverage. DO NOT FIX — they are the test targets.

bugs.summary: Save throws a TypeError before showing the 'Saved' toast — UI never confirms.
bugs.repro: Settings → type a name → click Save

bugs.summary: Username field silently strips spaces on input — typed 'Wesley Lu' is stored as 'WesleyLu'.
Save profile accepts any email (empty / no @) and reports success.
Theme selection resets after navigating away and back (stored in a view-local var).
bugs.repro: Settings → Theme=Dark → Dashboard → Settings (back to System)

bugs.summary: 'N active' badge counts completed tasks too (should count only not-done).
bugs.repro: Tasks → the badge shows total, not active

bugs.summary: Cart total sums quantities and ignores price (2x$12 + 1x$4.50 shows $3.00, not $28.50).
bugs.repro: Cart → compare Total to line items

bugs.summary: 'Place order' succeeds with an empty cart.
bugs.repro: Cart → remove all items → Place order → 'Order placed!'

bugs.summary: Notifications toggle flips the label/visual but never updates state — Dashboard still says Off.
bugs.repro: Settings → toggle Notifications On → Dashboard shows Off

bugs.summary: The 'Export data' button is specified for the About screen but never rendered.
'Cancel subscription' button has no handler — clicking it does nothing.
bugs.repro: Billing → click Cancel subscription → nothing happens

bugs.summary: Task completion always shows 100% (divides done by done, not done by total).
bugs.repro: Reports → completion is 100% even with unfinished tasks

bugs.summary: Invite accepts an empty/invalid email and adds a blank member.
bugs.repro: Team → Invite with empty field → a blank member is added

bugs.summary: Remove always deletes the FIRST member, not the row clicked.
bugs.repro: Team → Remove the 2nd member → the 1st disappears instead
